OSHINOGO-PHOTO.title: Photo
OSHINOGO-PHOTO.description: At the end of each battle, restore 3 points of life to Ruby. For every 1 point of Shine/Revenge, an additional 1/3 point of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO-FAMILY_PHOTO.title: Family Photos
OSHINOGO-FAMILY_PHOTO.description: At the end of each battle, restore 5 health points to Ruby. For every 1 point of Shine/Revenge, an additional 3/4 points of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO-KANA_ARIMA.title: With The Guidance Of Maganai
OSHINOGO-KANA_ARIMA.description: Gain 1 sparkle point at the beginning of each battle.
OSHINOGO-KANA_ARIMA.flavor: It is said that he was once a talented child star who could cry in ten seconds.
OSHINOGO-MEM.title: Operation Of MEM
OSHINOGO-MEM.description: Gain an additional 20% when getting money.
OSHINOGO-MEM.flavor: JK virtual idols are enthusiastic and energetic, but they hid a secret when they joined...
OSHINOGO-NEW_B_KOMACHI.title: Freshman B Komachi
OSHINOGO-NEW_B_KOMACHI.description: Add a secret code B to the deck.
OSHINOGO-NEW_B_KOMACHI.flavor: The freshman B Komachi is composed of Ruby, Kana, and Mem.
OSHINOGO-BROTHER_WATCH.title: Keep Watch
OSHINOGO-BROTHER_WATCH.description: Each time you receive damage, you will recover 2 points of life.
OSHINOGO-BROTHER_WATCH_E_X.title: Overwatch EX
OSHINOGO-BROTHER_WATCH_E_X.description: Each time you receive damage, 4 points of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO-BROTHER_WATCH.flavor: Ruby's brother entered the entertainment industry for some unknown reason. Although he looks cold and venomous on the surface, he is actually a very gentle person.
OSHINOGO-BROTHER_WATCH_E_X.flavor: Ruby's brother entered the entertainment industry for some unknown reason. Although he looks cold and venomous on the surface, he is actually a very gentle person.
OSHINOGO-SARINA.title: Sarina's Passion
OSHINOGO-SARINA.description: Get 3 blood-soaked petals at the beginning of the battle.
OSHINOGO-SARINA.flavor: Even in the ward, I always believed that the stage would Shine.
OSHINOGO-AKANE.title: Lover's Support
OSHINOGO-AKANE.description: The number of positive effects you have is doubled every three turns.
OSHINOGO-AKANE.flavor: The cherished feelings will continue to echo in the battle.
